features: Fantastic cling film for culinary use
Durable film will not rip when pulled taut
Cutter box allows you to easily cut film
description: Product Description This cling film is a perfect way to prevent the cultivation of bacteria and to retain freshness. The cling film comes in a specially designed cutter box that features a serrated edge, perfect for cutting through the film and measuring the right quantity. Designed to be long-lasting, this film can be pulled taut without ripping or tearing, making it perfect for covering a range of items. This cling film measures 300 mm x 300 m. Box Contains 1x Cling Film
